understood_request: The user wants to see the number of purchase orders and total dollar amount grouped by purchase order status. This requires loading purchase order data from procurement.purchase_orders into the vault (hub + satellite), then building a mart that aggregates PO count and total dollar amount per status.

vault.ddl:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS hub_purchase_order (
  purchase_order_hk VARCHAR(32) PRIMARY KEY,
  purchase_order_bk VARCHAR NOT NULL,
  load_dts TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  record_source VARCHAR NOT NULL
)
vault.load_sql:
INSERT INTO hub_purchase_order
SELECT DISTINCT
  md5(UPPER(TRIM(CAST(po_id AS VARCHAR)))) AS purchase_order_hk,
  CAST(po_id AS VARCHAR) AS purchase_order_bk,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS load_dts,
  'procurement.purchase_orders' AS record_source
FROM stg_procurement_purchase_orders
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM hub_purchase_order h
  WHERE h.purchase_order_bk = CAST(stg_procurement_purchase_orders.po_id AS VARCHAR)
)

vault.ddl:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sat_purchase_order_details (
  purchase_order_hk VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
  load_dts TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  load_end_dts TIMESTAMP,
  record_source VARCHAR NOT NULL,
  hashdiff VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
  vendor_id BIGINT,
  status_code BIGINT,
  status VARCHAR,
  order_date TIMESTAMP,
  ship_date TIMESTAMP,
  subtotal DOUBLE,
  tax_amount DOUBLE,
  total_due DOUBLE
)
vault.load_sql:
INSERT INTO sat_purchase_order_details
SELECT DISTINCT
  md5(UPPER(TRIM(CAST(s.po_id AS VARCHAR)))) AS purchase_order_hk,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS load_dts,
  NULL AS load_end_dts,
  'procurement.purchase_orders' AS record_source,
  md5(
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.vendor_id AS VARCHAR), '')))
    || '|' || UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.status_code AS VARCHAR), '')))
    || '|' || UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.status AS VARCHAR), '')))
    || '|' || UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.order_date AS VARCHAR), '')))
    || '|' || UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.ship_date AS VARCHAR), '')))
    || '|' || UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.subtotal AS VARCHAR), '')))
    || '|' || UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.tax_amount AS VARCHAR), '')))
    || '|' || UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.total_due AS VARCHAR), '')))
  ) AS hashdiff,
  s.vendor_id,
  s.status_code,
  s.status,
  s.order_date,
  s.ship_date,
  s.subtotal,
  s.tax_amount,
  s.total_due
FROM stg_procurement_purchase_orders s
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM sat_purchase_order_details sat
  WHERE sat.purchase_order_hk = md5(UPPER(TRIM(CAST(s.po_id AS VARCHAR))))
  AND sat.hashdiff = md5(
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.vendor_id AS VARCHAR), '')))
    || '|' || UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.status_code AS VARCHAR), '')))
    || '|' || UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.status AS VARCHAR), '')))
    || '|' || UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.order_date AS VARCHAR), '')))
    || '|' || UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.ship_date AS VARCHAR), '')))
    || '|' || UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.subtotal AS VARCHAR), '')))
    || '|' || UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.tax_amount AS VARCHAR), '')))
    || '|' || UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(s.total_due AS VARCHAR), '')))
  )
  AND sat.load_end_dts IS NULL
)

mart.ddl:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS mart_purchase_order_status_summary (
  status VARCHAR,
  po_count BIGINT,
  total_dollar_amount DOUBLE,
  mart_insert_dts TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
)
mart.populate_sql: DELETE FROM mart_purchase_order_status_summary; INSERT INTO mart_purchase_order_status_summary SELECT spod.status, COUNT(DISTINCT hpo.purchase_order_hk) AS po_count, SUM(spod.total_due) AS total_dollar_amount, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS mart_insert_dts FROM hub_purchase_order AS hpo INNER JOIN sat_purchase_order_details AS spod ON hpo.purchase_order_hk = spod.purchase_order_hk WHERE spod.load_end_dts IS NULL GROUP BY spod.status
